selected_defects.title: Add dual-engine live call smoke for current preferred and fallback engines
selected_defects.summary: Phase 8 promoted `voxcpm2` as preferred live-call TTS with `f5` retained as fallback, while the existing live browser spec still hardcoded `f5`.

selected_defects.title: Create Phase 03.1 evidence artifact before production fixes
selected_defects.summary: Phase 03.1 requires a dedicated sanitized evidence scaffold and runtime-sensitive JSON artifact map before implementation plans run.

selected_defects.title: Review deploy script resident-engine guard against VoxCPM2 default proof
selected_defects.summary: The canonical deploy path currently verifies resident `f5`; later live dual-engine proof must decide whether that guard is retained or updated in the script itself.

selected_defects.title: Prove reconnect/drop terminal states end truthfully and preserve rows
selected_defects.summary: Prior live failures left calls frozen, failed, or missing call_end/user_speech rows after reconnect and transport closure.

selected_defects.title: Preserve long-turn phone-call speech chunks across pauses and reconnects
selected_defects.summary: User-provided expected-versus-actual transcripts show whole spoken spans missing from long phone-call turns, not ordinary word-level STT substitutions.

selected_defects.title: Make reconnect PCM gap and tail selection contiguous
selected_defects.summary: Live debug evidence showed browser reconnect backfill covered `5226-35256ms` and later `69467-99412ms`, omitting the contiguous `35256-69467ms` browser-captured span.

selected_defects.title: Prevent false browser-facing reconnect-backfill 502 after backend accepts PCM
selected_defects.summary: Browser saw `502 Bad Gateway` for reconnect audio while backend logs showed the same PCM batch was applied, confusing recovery behavior and diagnostics.

selected_defects.title: Recover late STT user_final after end or closed data channel
selected_defects.summary: Several repros reached STT and queued or skipped `user_final` after the data channel closed or after `/end`, making the transcript unreachable without retention/recovery proof.

selected_defects.title: Preserve post-snapshot do-not-retry guard
selected_defects.summary: The failed post-`6607214` reconnect final-marker/data-channel replay/hangup drain patch stack must not be reintroduced as a small fix.
selected_defects.forbidden_change: Do not reintroduce the failed `6f63de0` + `a0d5d17` reconnect final-marker/data-channel replay/hangup drain patch stack as a small fix.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: VAD-driven barge-in
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Phase 4 call-feel capability; not required for current MVP stabilization.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: echo-loop mitigation
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Phase 4 call-feel capability; not required for current MVP stabilization.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: TTFA target optimization
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Phase 4 call-feel capability; Phase 03.1 only smokes current engines.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: advanced call-feel tuning
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Phase 4 scope; not part of reconnect/drop/writeback stabilization.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: full visualizer polish
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Phase 4 or later UI polish; MVP state preservation only.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: new in-call features
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: Feature expansion is excluded from the stabilization phase.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: redesigned user-visible reconnect feature
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: D-16 limits this phase to stabilizing existing recovery/backfill behavior.

deferred_out_of_scope.name: broad call UI redesign
deferred_out_of_scope.reason: D-23 limits UI changes to small recovery/status/copy fixes.

commands_run.command: uv run --project ai-backend pytest ai-backend/tests/test_call_session.py ai-backend/tests/test_webrtc_signaling.py -q
npm --prefix web-ui/client run test:unit -- --run tests/unit/call-audio.test.ts tests/unit/call-state.test.ts tests/unit/reconnect-backfill.test.ts
